pi_items.source: Web search confirmed ssa.gov is the official Social Security Administration website and irs.gov is the official Internal Revenue Service website

pi_items.verified_value: ssa.gov and irs.gov are official federal government domains
pi_items.source: Web search and official government websites at https://www.ssa.gov/ and https://www.irs.gov/

pi_items.verified_value: Valid local file path for report output
pi_items.source: Path specification in task.json; /home/ga/Desktop is standard Linux home directory with Desktop folder

pi_items.verified_value: 800 characters is a substantive minimum for a comprehensive accessibility audit report
pi_items.source: README.md states 'Minimum report length: ~800 characters (a substantive document)'; corresponds to 'Report is adequate length' threshold in verifier.py:174

pi_items.metadata_value: WCAG 2.1 is the official Web Content Accessibility Guidelines standard
pi_items.verified_value: WCAG 2.1 was published June 5, 2018 by W3C Web Accessibility Initiative; ADA Title II regulatory rule establishes WCAG 2.1 Level AA as the technical standard for federal accessibility compliance
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed WCAG 2.1 official documentation at https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG21/

pi_items.metadata_value: alt text is a WCAG 2.1 success criterion
pi_items.verified_value: Success Criterion 1.1.1 Non-text Content (Level A) requires text alternatives for images

pi_items.metadata_value: ARIA labels are part of WCAG 2.1 success criteria
pi_items.verified_value: ARIA labels are specified in multiple WCAG 2.1 success criteria including SC 1.3.1, SC 2.4.6, SC 4.1.2, and SC 2.5.3 Label in Name

pi_items.metadata_value: contrast is a WCAG 2.1 success criterion
pi_items.verified_value: Success Criterion 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum) Level AA requires contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for text

pi_items.metadata_value: keyboard navigation is a WCAG 2.1 success criterion
pi_items.verified_value: Success Criterion 2.1.1 Keyboard (Level A) requires all functionality to be operable through keyboard interface

pi_items.metadata_value: Lighthouse is available as an accessibility audit tool in Microsoft Edge DevTools
pi_items.verified_value: Lighthouse is an open-source automated auditing tool available in Chrome and Edge DevTools for accessibility, performance, SEO audits; produces numeric accessibility scores

pi_items.metadata_value: Federal government websites are required to comply with Section 508 and WCAG 2.1
pi_items.verified_value: Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act (1998) requires federal agencies to make electronic and information technology accessible; Standards incorporate WCAG 2.0 AA at minimum

pi_items.metadata_value: ssa.gov is required to comply with Section 508 and WCAG
pi_items.verified_value: SSA acknowledges Section 508 compliance and implements WCAG 2.0, 2.1, and 2.2 guidelines; maintains publicly available accessibility pages at https://www.ssa.gov/accessibility/
pi_items.source: Web search found SSA Accessibility page at https://www.ssa.gov/accessibility/ which documents compliance with Section 508 and WCAG

pi_items.metadata_value: irs.gov is required to comply with Section 508 and WCAG
pi_items.verified_value: IRS states it designed webpages to meet or exceed Section 508 standards and conform to WCAG Levels A and AA; maintains publicly available accessibility pages at https://www.irs.gov/accessibility
pi_items.source: Web search found IRS Accessibility page at https://www.irs.gov/accessibility documenting compliance with Section 508 and WCAG 2.1

pi_items.metadata_value: Task operates on real live government websites
pi_items.verified_value: No synthetic data; task requires agent to visit real websites (ssa.gov and irs.gov) and perform real Lighthouse audits; data is collected from live websites
pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh query browser history for real domain visits; README describes visiting actual government websites

pi_items.metadata_value: Microsoft Edge DevTools includes Lighthouse and Accessibility tools
pi_items.verified_value: Microsoft Edge is a Chromium-based browser that includes built-in Lighthouse audit tool and Accessibility DevTools panel
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Edge includes Lighthouse at https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/devtools-guide-chromium/accessibility/lighthouse

pi_items.metadata_value: Web Developers, UX Researchers, and Accessibility Specialists perform WCAG 2.1 compliance auditing for government sites
pi_items.verified_value: Accessibility auditing is a recognized professional practice; government agencies are legally required to maintain Section 508 and WCAG 2.1 compliance, creating demand for these services
pi_items.source: Evidence from government websites documenting Section 508 requirements and publicly available accessibility pages demonstrating ongoing compliance work

privileged_info_summary: This task involves auditing two real U.S. federal government websites (ssa.gov and irs.gov) for WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance. Both websites are legally required under Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act to meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility standards. The task requires using Microsoft Edge's built-in Lighthouse tool to audit accessibility of multiple pages on each site, documenting violations of WCAG 2.1 success criteria including: missing alt text (SC 1.1.1), color contrast failures (SC 1.4.3), keyboard navigation issues (SC 2.1.1), and missing ARIA labels (SC 1.3.1, SC 4.1.2, SC 2.5.3). The agent must produce a comprehensive audit report with Lighthouse accessibility scores and severity classifications. No synthetic data is used; all testing occurs on live government websites.
